examples: Young people often congregate in the main square in the evenings.
When it rains, the adults emerge and congregate to mate at temporary ponds.
He said: 'I never go to places where crowds congregate.
Entire towns congregate around sporting arenas to watch members of the community fight each other.
Regardless of the time of year, sun worshippers congregate on the Diller-von Furstenberg Sundeck.
